name: Cross-Prompt Based Automatic Short Answer Grading System
summary: Cross-prompt automatic short-answer grading study using manual response augmentation and SMOTE feature-space oversampling to address imbalanced Indonesian short-answer score distributions.

access_attempts.result: Full-text PDF downloaded and text extracted.
access_attempts.notes: Sections reviewed: Abstract, Introduction, Research Method/Data Acquisition, Scoring Module, Results and Discussion, Tables II-V, Data Availability.

access_attempts.result: Crossref metadata verified DOI, authors, venue, issue, pages, and publication date.
